body: {"rationale":"All 8 rubric criteria met: title is imperative and names subsystem plus change; description contains PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE with three explicit file:line anchors, PROPOSED FIX, and NON-SCOPE; AC is numbered with three named Test* functions and a go test -run regex; final two AC lines are the cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test gate and lefthook run pre-commit; labels carry spec:FEAT-010 and spec:ADR-023 cross-refs plus from: back-ref; parent and deps are explicit with rationale; description is standalone with no /tmp or chat references.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":["AC #3 contains a conditional clause ('or the replacement-validator equivalent after ddx-a41e6fbb lands') that introduces an undeclared soft dependency. Either make the current failure detail unconditional and drop the conditional arm, or add ddx-a41e6fbb to the deps list with a note that it is non-blocking.","Title says 'safe-rewrite' but the description consistently uses 'unsafe rewrite' and 'unsafe rewrite rejection'. Aligning the title to 'park rejected unsafe-rewrite attempts' removes a parsing ambiguity for a cold reader."],"waivers_applied":[]}

error: failed to push some refs to 'https://github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx': exit status 1","malformed":true,"rationale":"The work landed locally (result_rev 4911ca756) and the commits look correct, but the pre-push hook (lefthook full-tests) runs `go test -race` which requires CGO. The push environment has CGO_ENABLED=0 (the OrbStack Linux container default), so the hook exits 2 and the push is rejected. This is not a code defect or transient network failure — retrying without an environment fix will reproduce the same result. A human must either set CGO_ENABLED=1 in the lefthook full-tests stanza or arrange for the push to run in a CGO-capable shell.","recommended_action":"needs_human","result_rev":"4911ca75691984376e39da5ef4216e9e7ff7f062","session_id":"eb-20a84854","status":"push_failed","suggested_amendments":[],"suggested_followup_beads":[]}
